steps.title: Convert 10% to a decimal
steps.content:
10% means 10 per 100, which can be written as a decimal or fraction:
$$10\% = 0.10 = \frac{1}{10}$$

steps.title: Multiply the harvest by the decimal
steps.content:
To find how many tomatoes Lina gave away, multiply the total harvest by the decimal form:
$$680 \times 0.10 = 68$$
Lina gave 68 cherry tomatoes to her neighbor.
